Title: 10th Anual International Design Award
Description: The International Design Awards (IDA) exists to recognize, celebrate and promote legendary design visionaries and to uncover emerging talent in Architecture, Interior, Product, Graphic, and Fashion Design. IDA aspires to draw attention to the iconoclasm of design world wide, conceptualizing and producing great work by distributing the prestigious International Design Award. The project that was given the award is The Savannah Rowlocks Station completed under studio supervision of Christine Wacta. Programs used in the project: Autodesk Revit, Autodesk Maya, ESRI ArcGIS Pro, ESRI City Engine, Unreal Engine. https://idesignawards.com/winners/zoom2.php?eid=9-14182-17

Title: Autodesk Featured
Description: Savannah Wharf and NYSTSS are featured as projects representing Autodesks panorama rendering capabilities.   http://pano.autodesk.com/

Title: William Tao Prize
Description: Established by William K.Y. Tao, PE, alumnus, emeritus trustee and affiliate professor at Washington University, the William Tao Prize provides an annual cash award to students who have demonstrated excellence in the understanding and application of building systems in architecture, including illumination, electrical and mechanical engineering, and energy-efficient design.
